description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a vibrant, swirling abstract wallpaper in multiple colors, and a small earpiece slot at the top. The back is matte black and houses a prominent square camera module in the upper left corner, containing four lenses and a flash. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with several small buttons visible along the left and right edges. The device is thin and compact, typical of contemporary mobile phones, and is designed for handheld use. No visible branding or external case is present.
description: A slim, modern smartphone with a colorful display, matte black back, and a quad-lens camera module in the upper left corner.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, colorful display with an abstract swirl wallpaper and a small earpiece slot at the top.
description_view_1: Left edge view revealing the device's thin profile and several small side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a matte black surface and a square quad-lens camera module with flash in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Right edge view highlighting the slimness of the phone and additional side buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vibrant, abstract swirl wallpaper with a mix of bright colors and a small earpiece slot at the top. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a square camera module in the upper left corner on the back, containing four camera lenses and a flash arranged in a 2x2 grid.
attribute_button_layout: Multiple small physical buttons are visible along both the left and right edges, likely for volume control and power functions.
